fix-merge-main.description: Resolve merge conflicts against main and keep iterating until checks pass.
fix-merge-main.prompt: Before proceeding, confirm the current branch is not main — if it is, stop immediately and report an error. Merge the latest main into the current branch and resolve all conflicts. Validate with git status that no conflicts remain. Monitor CI/CD checks and iterate on fixes until all checks pass and the branch is clean against main.
